a:
Astarter is Infrastructure for the Autonomous AI Economy — a decentralized Web4 project combining DePIN infrastructure with on-chain execution. It enables autonomous AI agents to operate, coordinate, and create real economic value, laying the foundation for a global AI agent economy.

Three core pillars:
• Decentralized AI Agent Network — user-owned agents anyone can deploy
• On-Chain Execution Layer — AI agents execute trades and strategies on-chain
• ABox + DePIN Node Network — hardware nodes providing compute, execution, and revenue sharing

Backed by OKX Ventures and EMURGO.

Astarter solves three core problems:
• AI is centralized — a few companies control AI; users cannot own, deploy, or monetize it
• DePIN lacks an AI coordination layer — existing networks provide compute but no AI-native application layer
• AI is not natively economic on-chain — AI cannot autonomously execute trades; blockchains lack intelligent execution actors

Astarter fixes all three by combining DePIN infrastructure with autonomous on-chain AI agents.

ABox is Astarter's core AI node device — plug-and-play hardware that lets anyone run AI agents and join the global AI economy.

Key features:
• Open Protocol via OpenClaw — compatible with LangChain, AutoGPT, and major agent frameworks
• On-Chain Execution — built-in engine for smart contract calls and DeFi trades
• Multi-Agent Runtime — multiple AI agents running in parallel
• Plug-and-Play — connects to Astarter network out of the box

q: What are the ABox node tiers, prices, and how do I earn?
a:
ABox nodes come in three tiers (all include revenue sharing + presale whitelist):
• LITE — $500 | 1,333 tokens | 12,000 slots
• PRO — $1,000 | 2,900 tokens | 4,137 slots
• MAX — $3,000 | 10,500 tokens | 1,142 slots

Revenue streams for all node operators:
• AI agent execution fees
• ABox compute rewards
• Agent Marketplace revenue
• AI DEX trading fees
• Prediction Market fees

Higher tier = more tokens = larger share of network revenue.

Astarter uses a Four-Layer AI Economy Architecture:
• Layer 1 — Infrastructure: High-performance blockchain with AI-native execution environment
• Layer 2 — Node Layer (ABox): DePIN nodes provide compute, run AI agents, share in network revenue
• Layer 3 — Agent Layer (CORE): Autonomous AI agents executing trades, strategies, and predictions
• Layer 4 — Application Layer: AI DEX, Prediction Market, Data Market, Agent App Store

Astarter's AI Agent-powered applications:
• AI DEX — AI agents execute trading, market-making, and arbitrage to improve on-chain liquidity
• Prediction Market — Agents analyze on-chain and external data for accurate predictions
• Data Market — Agents generate, process, and trade data in a decentralized data network
• Agent Marketplace (App Store) — Buy, deploy, or rent AI agents; developers monetize their agents

q: What is the on-chain economic flywheel?
a:
Astarter's economic flywheel:
• Applications (DEX, prediction markets, data markets) send tasks to AI Agents
• Agents execute and generate revenue
• Revenue incentivizes ABox Nodes
• Nodes provide more compute and execution capacity
• Supports more agents and larger demand → self-reinforcing growth cycle

CORE is Astarter's Layer 3 Agent Layer — the autonomous AI agent platform sitting between ABox nodes (Layer 2) and applications (Layer 4). It's the intelligence and execution brain of the network, where agents execute trades, strategies, and predictions to generate revenue.

OpenClaw is the open protocol powering ABox. It makes ABox compatible with major open-source AI agent frameworks (LangChain, AutoGPT, etc.), so any developer can build and deploy agents on Astarter.

Total supply: 1,000,000,000 (1 billion tokens).

Allocation:
• Ecosystem & Community: 42% — incentives, marketing, ecosystem rewards
• Ecosystem Development: 38%
• Market Cap Management: 10%
• R&D: 5%
• Node Airdrop: 4%
• Community Incentives: 1%

Staking Mining: 250,000 tokens/day, 10% reduction every 6 months.

Vesting: Team and investors have a 1-year cliff + 4-year linear vesting.

q: When is the TGE? When is the token launch?
a:
The exact TGE (Token Generation Event) date has not been officially announced yet. Based on the roadmap, the Mainnet launch — which coincides with TGE — is planned for 2026 Q2–Q3.

For the latest official updates, follow our channels: https://linktr.ee/Astarter

Astarter roadmap:
• 2025 Q3–Q4: ABox node deployment launch, Testnet launch
• 2026 Q2–Q3: Mainnet launch + TGE, Astarter Grant program, native AI agent ↔ DePIN node interaction
• 2026 Q4: ABox Agent App Store launch, major blockchain integrations, more compute nodes
• 2027+: Automated agent-to-agent execution, next-generation Web4 agent economy

q: Who owns Astarter? Who is behind Astarter? Who is the team?
a:
Astarter is a community-driven project — not owned by one person. It is backed by leading crypto investors including OKX Ventures and EMURGO.

Advisors:
• Sergio Sanchez — Head of Product at EMURGO (Yoroi Wallet)
• John O'Connor — Director of African Operations at IOHK/Cardano
• Darren Camas — CEO of IPOR Labs

Ownership is distributed across the ecosystem and token holders. Follow all official channels: https://linktr.ee/Astarter
